description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat, dark roof and a rectangular footprint. The front features a driveway leading to a main entrance flanked by two small shrubs, and the facade is composed of light-colored walls with large windows. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a landscaped backyard with a small pool, patio furniture, and a row of tall, evenly spaced trees providing privacy. The side views reveal the elongated structure of the house, with additional windows and a continuous concrete pathway. The property is enclosed by a low wall, and the landscaping is minimalistic, emphasizing clean lines and open space. The overall design is contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and integration with the outdoor environment.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped backyard featuring a pool and tall trees. The design is clean and contemporary, with minimalistic landscaping and a prominent driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, main entrance, two small shrubs, and the flat roof.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, large windows, and the backyard with pool and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio furniture, and privacy trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the driveway extending, visible side windows, and landscaped boundary.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
